name: Brandon W.
headline: Embedded engineering recruiter for backend, platform, and senior IC searches.
bio: Best fit for early engineering teams that need a recruiter who can own process while also digging into technical calibration with founders.

name: Eche N.
headline: Founding-team recruiter for founding engineers and early technical hires.
bio: Strong when the brief is still fuzzy and the founder needs help shaping the scorecard, narrative, and outbound strategy for a critical first hire.

name: Courtney M.
headline: Go-to-market recruiter for early sales and commercial team builds.
bio: Useful when a startup needs fast learning loops on GTM profile, compensation, and candidate quality instead of a generic agency blast.

name: Lavanya B.
headline: Technical recruiter for frontend and scaled engineering orgs.
bio: Best fit for later-stage product and engineering teams that still want embedded marketplace support without losing speed or visibility.

name: Robson C.
headline: Post-sales and customer success recruiter for startup GTM teams.
bio: Great when the company needs someone who can pressure-test customer-facing profiles and keep the search tightly tied to ramp expectations.

name: Michelle S.
headline: Technical GTM recruiter for developer-facing roles and product storytelling hires.
bio: A strong option when the role sits between product, community, and GTM and the hiring team needs judgment on a hybrid profile.
